text:
There was a little girl named Holly who loved playing by the stream nearby her house.

One sunny day, Holly decided she wanted to visit the place where the old oak tree fell long ago.

She took her little pink butterfly net and walked along the stream. The sun felt warm on her face.

She found the old oak tree and sat down under it to watch the little birds flitting about.

She noticed a cat with an umbrella hat.

She reached out a little pink paw to pet the cat.

The cat turned, surprised.

The cat was a very wise owl.

"Oh hello there! I hear you're interested in tales?"

Holly nodded eagerly. "Of course! You're so old and wise!"

The owl hooted wisdom.

"Wise owl, tell me a story!"

The owl hooted a story about a beautiful princess who fell asleep one night dreaming of blue skies and laughter.

Late next morning, she woke up feeling starry-eyed.
